title: Cobblemon- The Strongest Gems of Nature
description: This is the 3rd gen of Cobblemon with a small improvement from the other ones with a remains of the one that came before. This time about Hoenn part of Cobblemon (Known for there Pokemons Strength)
body:
This is the 3rd part of the Cobblemon series that is based off of the Hoenn part of Cobblemon with some changes from the one that contains mods for quality of life Mods and datapacks based off of Sapphire, Ruby and Sapphire/Omega and Emerald

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Update Log: 0,0,1 (Creation of modpack)

</details>
